spoken_line: Real discovery begins when we look a little closer.

phoneme_timeline.line: Real discovery begins when we look a little closer.

philosophy.rule: Every shot has a purpose. Every movement supports the story.

director_package.story_objective: Real discovery begins when we look a little closer
director_package.actor_objective: Approach instrument, pause with intent, then teach to camera
director_package.editing_objective: Transition hold_then_cut with ending beat settle_then_cut
director_package.shot_purpose: establishing serves curiosity: Real discovery begins when we look a little closer

actor_direction.objective: Approach instrument, pause with intent, then teach to camera
actor_direction.example_philosophy: Doctor walks to microscope. Stops. Looks down. Pauses. Breathes. Turns toward viewer. Smiles. Explains. Returns to work.

validation.success: Feels directed by an experienced filmmaker — each shot supports story, emotion, and educational message.
validation.note: Passing this plan gate is necessary but not sufficient. Inspect the final MP4 for intentional direction.

philosophy.rule: Every second must contain genuine character animation.
philosophy.reject_if: motion could be recreated by moving a still photograph

objective.statement: Real discovery begins when we look a little closer

body_performance.philosophy: Animate the actor. Never animate a photograph.

camera_follow.notes: Camera records the performance. Actor locomotion is primary; camera crop/track is secondary.

validation.quality_test: Reject any shot that could be recreated by moving a still photograph.
validation.success_standard: Viewer believes: I'm watching an animated television show — not animated pictures.
validation.note: Passing this plan gate is necessary but not sufficient. Inspect the final MP4 for genuine character animation.

philosophy.rule: Scenes reference the actor. Scenes never recreate the actor.

facial_rig.continuity_rule: Same canonical facial rig across all scenes for this character.

performance_system.philosophy: Actors own clips. Scenes choose actions. Never regenerate walks per episode.

validation.rule: Scenes reference the actor. Scenes never recreate the actor.
validation.success: Permanent cast of digital actors with reusable rigs, animations, personalities, and performances.

philosophy.rule: Characters move through the world. They do not stand in front of photographs.

camera.notes: Camera records the stage performance. Actor locomotion is primary.

definition.name: Primary Diagnostic Laboratory
definition.memorable_feature: warm-blue holographic teaching column at center

must_answer: How do they move through it?

set_dressing.prop_continuity_rule: Props must not move between shots without explanation.

continuity_rules: Props keep default_location unless story explains move.
Architecture function remains readable across episodes.
Lighting sources remain motivated and consistent with time_of_day.
Weather is a shared world state affecting cloth, plants, and reflections.
Foreground / midground / background layers required every shot.
environment_package.quality_caveat: An Environment Package is an execution contract — not proof of quality. Final acceptance requires inspecting the rendered MP4 for depth, materials, weather response, lighting coherence, and environmental continuity.

validation.success: Persistent worlds populated by reusable digital actors — filmed on a real set, not assembled from disconnected images.
validation.note: Passing this plan gate is necessary but not sufficient. Inspect the final MP4: actors must navigate living stages, not photos.
